mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_knowledge_base (agent_id, knowledge_base_id, created_at) VALUES (CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid), CAST(#{knowledgeBaseId} AS uuid), #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM agent_knowledge_base WHERE agent_id = CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid)
DELETE FROM agent_knowledge_base WHERE knowledge_base_id = CAST(#{knowledgeBaseId} AS uuid)
mapper.select: SELECT knowledge_base_id FROM agent_knowledge_base WHERE agent_id = CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid) ORDER BY created_at ASC
